# BI-260009: Complete phase-2 legal and support content rewrite

- Backlog Item ID: BI-260009
- Title: Rewrite Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, and Support pages with product-accurate copy
- Status: Ready
- Persona/Actor: Legal/compliance stakeholder and public-site visitors
- Value statement: For visitors and legal stakeholders, replace the reviewed carry-over legal text
  from phase 1 (BI-260007) with professionally rewritten, product-accurate copy that reflects the
  current product scope, entity details, and applicable legal standards.
- Context: BI-260007 (phase 1) published reviewed archive-derived legal/support content as the
  launch baseline. ADR-260007 explicitly requires a tracked phase-2 full rewrite to follow.
- Problem statement: Phase-1 legal text is adapted from the archive and may not fully reflect
  current product scope, correct company details, governing-law specifics, or updated compliance
  requirements.
- Expected outcome: Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, and Support pages contain purpose-written
  copy reviewed for accuracy, completeness, and current legal standards.
- Success metric(s): All three pages pass an explicit legal/compliance review before publication;
  phase-1 content is fully replaced.
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - Privacy Policy is fully rewritten with product-accurate data handling description, reflecting
    the actual data flows and user rights for the current product.
  - Terms of Service is fully rewritten to reflect the current product scope, Aleutheris entity
    details, governing law, and applicable user obligations.
  - Support page copy is updated to match the current add-on version, capabilities, and support
    process.
  - All rewritten pages pass an explicit legal/compliance review before publication.
  - Rewritten pages are published and replace the phase-1 carry-over content on the live site.
  - Page routes (/privacy, /terms, /google-addon/support) remain unchanged.
- Non-goals: Redesigning page layout, navigation, or visual styling.
- Constraints: Routes and page structure must remain identical to phase-1 pages.
- Dependencies: Legal/compliance review input; confirmed product scope and entity details.
- Risks/assumptions: Delayed legal review can leave phase-1 text in place longer than intended.
- Validation approach: Legal reviewer sign-off per page; release gate checklist execution after publish.
- Priority score: High
- Target window: Immediately post-launch (phase 2)
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: n/a (tracked from ADR-260007)
  - ADR: ADR-260007.md
  - ICR: n/a
  - PR/changeset: n/a
